title: Cirrus: Make use of shared get_ci_vm container
body:
***WARNING***: DO NOT MERGE YET.  Core get_ci_vm container script not yet reviewed/finalized.

comments.body: Script updated to allow passing in `$DEBUG`
@jwhonce PTAL (and try it out, if you're able)
